code: import{useEffect,useRef}from'react';export default function useReveal(){const ref=useRef(null);useEffect(()=>{const el=ref.current;if(!el)return;const observer=new IntersectionObserver(_ref=>{let[entry]=_ref;if(entry.isIntersecting){el.classList.add('visible');observer.disconnect();}},{threshold:0.12});observer.observe(el);return()=>observer.disconnect();},[]);return ref;}
